query:
SELECT id, userId, requestedAmount, receiptImageUrl, referenceNumber, status 
FROM bank_transfer_requests 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 1;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 38MgGCfAkTTcdrf.ae1ad98e5b22 --database JYruXSQahvP3cr6rPdjNhA --execute SELECT id, userId, requestedAmount, receiptImageUrl, referenceNumber, status 
FROM bank_transfer_requests 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 1;
